articles.title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
articles.content: Both vulnerabilities allow untrusted users to gain root privileges.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌为Linux漏洞支付$ 250K ，允许访客虚拟机逃逸
articles.contentZh: 这两个漏洞都允许不受信任的用户获得root权限。

articles.title: Aussie gov't tells volunteers to throw out thousands of functioning test routers
articles.content: But the devices could "easily be reflashed."
articles.titleZh: 澳大利亚政府要求志愿者扔掉数千台功能正常的测试路由器
articles.contentZh: 但这些设备可以“轻松刷新”。

articles.title: US rare earths flow to Asia as domestic demand is slow to emerge
articles.content: Miners backed by Trump admin sell to Japan, South Korea despite push to develop domestic supply chain.
articles.titleZh: 由于国内需求增长缓慢，美国稀土流入亚洲
articles.contentZh: 尽管推动发展国内供应链，但特朗普政府支持的矿工仍向日本和韩国销售。

articles.title: Hackers can use 9 of the most popular AI tools to assemble massive botnets
articles.content: "HalluSquatting" weaponizes LLMs' inability to say "I don't know."
articles.titleZh: 黑客可以使用9种最流行的人工智能工具来组装大规模僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: “HalluSquatting”将LLM无法说“我不知道”作为武器。

articles.title: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
articles.content: Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. The wearer could then ask Meta AI about the captured audio and images. However, the images […]
articles.titleZh: 据报道， Meta正在开发可以一直录制的智能眼镜
articles.contentZh: Meta可能是下一家制造始终在线的人工智能可穿戴设备的公司。据英国《金融时报》报道，该公司正在开发“超感应”智能眼镜原型，该眼镜可以“每隔几秒钟”连续录制音频并拍摄照片。然后，佩戴者可以向Meta AI询问捕获的音频和图像。然而，图片[…]

articles.title: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
articles.content: Even though they haven’t been officially announced yet, Samsung is giving you a chance to save some cash when you preorder what we’re expecting to be the brand’s updated Galaxy Z Fold phones. The next Galaxy Unpacked event will take place on July 22nd, 2026, and features the tagline “A new shape unfolds.” In addition […]
articles.titleZh: 预订三星即将推出的Galaxy手机，即可获得$ 30的消费金
articles.contentZh: 尽管三星尚未正式宣布，但当您预订我们期望该品牌更新的Galaxy Z Fold手机时，三星将为您提供一些节省现金的机会。下一次Galaxy Unpacked活动将于2026年7月22日举行，其标语为“A new shape unfolds.“此外[…]
